text_block_list.text: A few days later. When I stopped by the track, I saw Victoire Pisa talking to a friend with a solemn look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: —Yeah. It was a condition I promised my parents when I entered the academy. If I didn't show any promise, I'd go back home and attend a normal high school.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I… see.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: Jeez, don't look so gloomy, Pisa～ I knew this was coming myself. I've worked hard for three years and haven't placed in a single mock race, you know?

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: So. The next mock race will be my last. If I still can't do it, I'm going home! And then, I'll entrust my dream of becoming a racing star to you, Pisa!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: ……I understand. I know that since this is a competitive world, these things are bound to happen.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: But still—it's sad.
A time always comes when one must think about their future and decide whether to move forward or step back. For an athlete, it's all the more unavoidable.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …If she made this decision from the bottom of her heart, I can't stop her. But… she said the 『next one will be my last』

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Her heart is still… connected to her dream of racing. In that case… I want to do whatever I can to help, even if it's just one thing.
—The next day.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Huup…!

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: I-It really looks exactly like my running form… To think you could even pull this off, you're so skilled, Pisa.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Let's work together to improve this form before the mock race. I'm sure you can still shave off some time.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: B-But, you have a mock race against Rose and the others too, right? They aren't opponents you can take on half-heartedly. You shouldn't be looking after me—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: It's fine. I just need to stay behind and do my own training afterward.
If she's planning to help her friend by demonstrating while also doing her own full training routine… that's clearly overworking herself.
Her rivals aren't soft enough that she can beat them while distracted with helping a friend. As long as she's aiming for her debut too, she can't afford to neglect her own training.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Staying close. Connecting hearts. Erasing loneliness from this world. If I do that, I believe one day we can create a circle of hope that connects the entire world.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I want to… keep the connection between your heart and racing alive.
—That's right. She wants to connect them. The people reflected in her eyes, and the things they each hold dear.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer…?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
This is your proposed form improvement plan, Trainer… 
It certainly might suit her. Let's head outside and try it right away.
choice_data_list: <size=34>Just make sure you leave some energy for yourself</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes, thank you for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Haa…!

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, your time has changed so much in just five days.
choice_data_list: It's fine to celebrate, but make sure you take a proper break
It's fine to celebrate, but make sure you take a proper break

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. 
I'll go get us some tea then.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: …Honestly, she looks like she's having so much fun even though it's someone else's training. Just watching her… makes the future feel bright. Haha, maybe it's just my imagination.
—And then, the day of the mock race arrived.
Victoire Pisa's friend gave it her all and beat her personal best—ending her final challenge in 6th place.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: Ah—just as I thought… it's frustrating… it's so frustrating… Pisa… show me… show me hope, Pisaaa…!

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: …Entrusted with your friend's feelings, I see. However—I won't do anything so tactless as to hold back because of that…!

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text: Whether you have special circumstances or not, it has no bearing on this match. Don't take it personally, Pisa…!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: —I won't let my guard down for a second. I will defeat you with everything I have. Because I know your potential.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (…It's too late to change the fact that she will leave the academy… Even so—)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Even so, at the very least… 
I want to leave hope in her heart…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaaah…!

—Several days later. 
The day came for Victoire Pisa's friend to leave the academy.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: …It's kind of strange, you know. Even though I lost and I'm leaving here, your running is burned into my mind. As if saying I don't want to forget it.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Friend
text_block_list.text: I promise. Even after I go back home, I'll always love racing. Because you… reconnected me to my feelings for racing, Pisa!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…Yes. Please take care. 
And… see you again someday.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…………………… 
In the end, we didn't achieve the best result.
Her friend left, and because of her lack of conditioning, she stalled out in the final stretch of her own mock race. Unsurprisingly, she didn't receive any scouting offers either.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Her telling me that she'll always love racing… 
is my one saving grace.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
choice_data_list: <size=38>Might not leave anything for you yourself</size>
<size=38>Might not leave anything for you yourself</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …That might be true.
choice_data_list: But the hope you've connected will remain in someone's heart
But the hope you've connected will remain in someone's heart

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
choice_data_list: I want to support that. Your journey of connecting feelings and bonds

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. Then—let's connect them together. Connecting hearts across the world, until all loneliness is gone.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Believing that even after the rain of sorrow falls… we'll be able to see a sky of hope—
